variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. R:nc. Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A. No explicit populated SG&A total row is present; 'Other Operating Expense' appears to be a subtotal that includes excluded D&A and possibly unusual items, so I avoided it per rules preferring components over totals. I therefore selected the recurring overhead components visible in column A: 'Labor & Related Expenses in SGA', 'Advertising Expenses', and 'Other Operating Expenses - remaining'. Manual review is needed because two selected labels were outside the candidate list and 'Other Operating Expenses - remaining' is a residual bucket that may mix items across years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Advertising Expenses, [Income Statement] Other Operating Expenses - remaining
No dedicated research/development row is visible on the income statement.
